revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ceb:Higashishirakawa-gun]][[en:Higashishirakawa District, Fukushima]][[fa:شهرستان هیگاشی‌شیروکاوا، فوکوشیما]][[fr:District de Higashishirakawa]][[id:Distrik Higashishirakawa, Fukushima]][[it:Distretto di Higashishirakawa]][[ja:東白川郡]][[ko:히가시시라카와군]][[nl:Higashishirakawa (district)]][[pl:Powiat Higashishirakawa]][[ru:Хигасисиракава (уезд)]][[sco:Higashishirakawa Destrict]][[uk:Повіт Хіґасі-Сіракава]][[zh-yue:東白川郡]][[zh:東白川郡]]
{{Unreferenced|date=December 2009}}
* [[List of Provinces of Japan]] > {{ill|Tōsandō|en|Tōsandō|qid=Q1334011|lt=Tōsandō|1=Tōsandō}} > {{ill|Mutsu Province|en|Mutsu Province|qid=Q907389|lt=Mutsu Province|1=Mutsu Province}} / {{ill|Iwaki Province (1868)|en|Iwaki Province (1868)|qid=Q201583|lt=Iwaki Province|1=Iwaki Province (1868)}} > '''Higashishirakawa District''' * {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}} > {{ill|Tōhoku region|en|Tōhoku region|qid=Q129465|lt=Tōhoku region|1=Tōhoku region}} > {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|en|Fukushima Prefecture|qid=Q71707|lt=Fukushima Prefecture|1=Fukushima Prefecture}} > '''Higashishirakawa District'''
[[File:Higashishirakawa District in Fukushima Prefecture.svg|thumb|Location of Higashishirakawa District in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|en|Fukushima Prefecture|qid=Q71707|lt=Fukushima Prefecture|1=Fukushima Prefecture}}]] {{nihongo|'''Higashishirakawa'''|東白川郡|Higashishirakawa-gun}} is a {{ill|Districts of Japan|en|Districts of Japan|qid=Q1122846|lt=district|1=Districts of Japan}} located in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|en|Fukushima Prefecture|qid=Q71707|lt=Fukushima Prefecture|1=Fukushima Prefecture}}, {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}.
As of 2003, the district has an estimated {{ill|Population|en|Population|qid=Q2625603|lt=Population|1=Population}} of 38,087 and a {{ill|Population density|en|Population density|qid=Q22856|lt=density|1=Population density}} of 61.34 persons per km<sup>2</sup>. The total area is 620.94 km<sup>2</sup>.
==Towns and villages== *{{ill|Hanawa, Fukushima|en|Hanawa, Fukushima|qid=Q1205922|lt=Hanawa|1=Hanawa, Fukushima}} *{{ill|Tanagura, Fukushima|en|Tanagura, Fukushima|qid=Q1155858|lt=Tanagura|1=Tanagura, Fukushima}} *{{ill|Yamatsuri, Fukushima|en|Yamatsuri, Fukushima|qid=Q1205018|lt=Yamatsuri|1=Yamatsuri, Fukushima}} *{{ill|Samegawa, Fukushima|en|Samegawa, Fukushima|qid=Q1205497|lt=Samegawa|1=Samegawa, Fukushima}}
{{Fukushima}}
{{coord|36.954|N|140.472|E|type:landmark_source:itwiki|display=title}}
